visual_diversity.rule: Do not allow 2+ consecutive slides with the same visual pattern unless intentionally approved in layout.plan.json.

principles: Build an independent executive narrative before AxlFlo positioning appears.
Use 15 core slides outside the starter and appendix: 12 narrative slides plus 3 AxlFlo / SHIFT to SCALE bridge slides.
Use approved premium visual variants from VISUAL_VARIANT_CATALOGUE.md before experimental renderers.
Keep the Microsoft edit claim proof-gated as source-alleged.
Do not mention the input format in slide-facing copy.
Make the final bridge commercially direct without weakening the independent narrative.

slides.creative_intent: Starter slide with strong executive provocation.
slides.visual_anchor: premium title block and closing line

slides.creative_intent: Core 1: Open with the 8-second hook and verification caution.
slides.visual_anchor: narrative hook plus two proof-status cards

slides.creative_intent: Core 2: Make the 12-18 month claim feel enormous and testable.
Core 3: Show leadership disagreement as a strategy caution.
slides.visual_anchor: narrative body plus three interpretation cards

slides.creative_intent: Core 4: Challenge the progress curve without dismissing AI.
Core 5: Deliver the strongest system thesis.
Core 6: Show that useful agents are governed systems.
Core 7: Show why code has verification and business work needs governance.
slides.visual_anchor: versioned evidence vs live judgment zones

slides.creative_intent: Core 8: Make ownership the center of the replacement debate.
Core 9: Make trust the real bottleneck.
slides.visual_anchor: looks right / not right / must be proven cards

slides.creative_intent: Core 10: Show CapEx, narrative, urgency, and buying as an incentive loop.
Core 11: Convert the Automation Audit into a decision table.
Core 12: Turn the source examples into an automate/augment/protect matrix.
Bridge 1: Move from diagnosis to AxlFlo operating answer.
Bridge 2: Map SHIFT to SCALE into the operating need.
Appendix with verification and usage notes.
